title: [SQUARE TWO] BLACK PINK 新人獎粗卡 (6)

replies.msg:
BLACK PINK（韓語：블랙핑크）是YG娛樂於2016年推出的韓國女子音樂組合，由JISOO、JENNIE、ROSE與LISA四名成員組成。2016年8月8日以數碼專輯《SQUARE ONE》正式出道。



YG娛樂表示BLACK PINK帶有稍微否定粉紅色是最美的顏色的涵義，具有「漂亮並不代表全部」的反轉意義，也表示成員們不僅具備外貌、同時也兼具實力。


第一張數碼專輯《SQUARE ONE》
發行日期：2016年8月8日
主打曲:
1.휘파람（WHISTLE）
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dISNgvVpWlo
2.붐바야（BOOMBAYAH）
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bwmSjveL3Lc



第二張數碼專輯《SQUARE TWO》
發行日期：2016年11月1日
主打曲
1.불장난（PLAYING WITH FIRE）
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9pdj4iJD08s
2.STAY
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FzVR_fymZw4

Get excited! You already heard the news from YG Entertainment that Black Pink will be guesting on 'Running Man' - now you can hear more in detail from the show's producer Jung Chul Min himself!

He said on November 29, "I saw Black Pink on 'Weekly Idol.' They gave off a raw vibe and made me wonder how it'd be if they were not in a studio but were running around in a wide space," explaining his reason for casting them.

The girls recently had taken part in the recording on November 28 in Jeonju. You can see a shot from the shoot down below. PD Jung Chul Min added about the girls' guest appearance, "Black Pink were fun and bright. Because they're new to variety, they had an unpredictable charm. You can look forward to it."
